Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rune Queen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Rune Queen left the castle and died soon after.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — The Rune Queen is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — The Rune Queen moved Shatterspine Castle and is now dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — The Rune Queen possesses a powerful madra that clashes with Ziel's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Rune Queen has a script containing a dragon Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Rune Queen possesses madra that can be consumed and vented.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — The Rune Queen provides silver runes.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel is experimenting with the Rune Queen’s array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Rune Queen's authority can alter reality through manipulations of her ancient script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Rune Queen created the Grand Oath Array.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
